name: Cod Baked in Sour Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds cod, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
Salt, pepper, paprika, wheat germ and sunflower seed.
1. Saute the shallots until they are softened.
2. Add the mushrooms to the saute pan and cook until they are browned.
3. Remove from heat and stir in dill and parsley. Set aside.
4. Rinse the cod and pat dry. Dust with seasoned flour.
5. Arrange half of the sliced mushrooms at the bottom of a buttered baking dish.
6. Cover with the fish fillets.
7. Top with remaining sliced mushrooms, grated Parmesan cheese, sour cream, bread crumbs, and butter.
8. Bake in an oven preheated to 375°F (190°C) for 20 minutes.
